feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Service Marketplace is missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I've recently ran into an issue where my service marketplace is not showing on the sap cockpit trial account anymore. I've been using cockpit for about a year now always renewing the 90day trial but this is the first time I came into the issue. 
I have about 20days left of the trial and it just disappeared yesterday, I haven't changed my roles or anything. 
When I set up this trial account, I set it up for integration suite so I can learn CPI, I had the service market place since then but its just gone now?
I saw some people on the community with this issue and their resolution were role based but I can't figure it out even with adding and removing role collections, etc.

entry.title: Integration possibilities from SAP CI(Integration Suite) to SWIFT???
entry.content:
Hi All,

While i was exploring the integration possibilities from CI to SWIFT had few questions around this as below.

1. If the integration has to be from S4HANA then there is a direct connector available for SWIFT which we can start configuring from SPRO tcode without the need of CI . Is is the best approach comparing to the other available options???

2. If the connector is not available might be S4HANA release issue or for normal ECC system then that case the traditional way of generating the file in AL11 from where CI will pick the drop onto the target system with all sort of security parameters(encryption/signature) maintained. We dont have standard prepackaged content like what we had for SWIFT SWCV in PI/PO??? Also the SFTP 3.0 which was used in PI/PO for SWIFT integration with the module configurations. How it can be accompanied in CI??? Are there any technical glitches???

3. Any other mechanisms for this integrations???

Please do share your thoughts on this.

Thank You.

Regards,

Farooq

entry.title: Migrate Objects in ZLOCAL Software Component into global Software Component in BTP, ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I created an app in the Z namespace in a package assigned to the Software Componente ZLOCAL. Now I would like to put this app in the SAP Marketplace. To do this, the objects must be in a package of a global SWC. Is there a way to move all objects to the global package or changing the SWC ZLOCAL of my local package? Assigning the local package to a global structure package (via Superpackage) does not work.

Thanks and Regards, Sebastian

entry.title: How to create RAP Action to generate a file to download?
entry.content:
In BTP ABAP Environment, I have a RAP entity with an action. Let's call the action 'generateFile'. In that action, I have specific logic that uses the XCO classes to build out an XLSX file. The RAP entity and its action are projected and exposed into a Fiori Elements application. The action is triggered from a user pressing a button.

The final step is that the XLSX file that is generated needs to be automatically downloaded to the user's frontend. Is there a way of doing that from the action itself? Or do I need to handle this from the Fiori app (meaning, no way to test the action from the OData service preview)?

entry.title: How to develop Customer Creation Application in SAP using SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Objective: -

Implementing SAP OData URI  to SAP Build and Creating Customers in SAP BUILD which can replicate to SAP System

 

Business Scenario: -

 How to create Customers using SAP Build Apps and OData Service.

 

Prerequisites: -

-> You Have an SAP BTP account or trial account.

-> Inside the BTP account, go to Instances and Subscriptions and create an instance of SAP Build Apps

-> Now go to Security -> Users Tab and assign Role to the user for SAP BUILD Apps

 

Now, we have to create the SAP Backend connection to SAP BTP : -

Before mapping data from S4H or our SAP System to Build Apps, we need to create a Destination in the BTP and give the required details of the S4H system with ODATA Uri too which we will consume (BTP->Connectivity->Destination )

 

 

Connection is now established to that service.

 

 

Now go to SAP Build Apps and navigate to Create to create a project.

 

 

Now click on Build an Application to create a Application

 

Now Click on Web & Mobile Application

 

 

Now Give the project name and Description and You are good to go.

Inside the app you are working on SAP Build App go to the Authentication section and implement authentication

Now create an App Variable that holds all fields that are present in our OData service.

Now create a page and install a template from the marketplace which is Basic List and implement your UI for Customer Creation and a home page where all customers are displayed.

Now go to the DATA Section then go to SAP Systems and connect to your s4h System and the service that you called from the destination  from SAP BTP will be available to you now.

 

Now Click on this list go to ‘list resource’ fill in all the fields and configure authentication from Properties

Now Go to the Logic section of List and implement logic like this

 

Now click on the Create button go to Show logic for Button then implement this logic

 

Now create another page as shown below and build a form to create Customer Data using input fields.

 

Now do data binding to all fields by clicking on it and then assigning value to it

 

Now do a similar mapping for every field

Also, implement a condition to alert that an empty value is not allowed.

Now on the submit button implement logic that submit the data and updates the data to that OData service and thus will be reflected in the database table too

Preview Your Developments: -

Now when everything is done go to the Launch section then Preview your app.

 

By this, we can preview our application either on the web or can be previewed in Smartphones.

Our Application Now looks like-

When we click on the create button the second page appears

 

Fill out details and now our customer is created.

So now your customer is created in your database table  which you can check by going to se11->KNA1

And you can see your entry got updated in table KNA1

entry.title: Retrieve metadata failed because the OData server returned HTTP code, 401
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you please help/support on the below error. Recently we have been facing an issue when accessing the SAP Hybrid App in IPAD, After the successful authentication when the call goes to gateway system we are getting this error. More details on the error 

Error Retrieve metadata failed because the OData server returned HTTP code, 401 with message "Logon Error Message"

The connections is via SAP BTP and we are seeing the same error logs in cloud platform. But I am not able to see any logs in gateways system.

Kindly let me know or help me to fix this issue. This is very urgent

entry.title: Roles for this buttons to appear
entry.content: What roles do I need in maintenance to see this buttons?

entry.title: Are there any recommendations / restriction of number of fields in a CDS view?
entry.content: Will it be ok to create "big" CDS views with thousands of fields from multiple tables / interface CDS views that should be used for ad-hoc reports in SE16x transactions?

entry.title: ABAP DDIC names of CDS Views
entry.content:
Hi friends

I would be thankful if you can provide me the ABAP DDIC names of the following Cloud CDS views:

I_MfgOrderItemSerialNumber

I_ManufacturingOrder

I_MfgOrderWithStatus

I_SerialNumberManufacturingOrd

Many thank!

Tom

entry.title: Seeking Clarification on Updated BTP Project Template Options [CAP Project]
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I've enrolled in a BTP course on Udemy titled BTP Learning .  While working on a CAP Project, I noticed a discrepancy between the project creation options shown in the video tutorial and those available in the current version of BTP. The options visible in the video are not present now. Could anyone clarify what changes have been made to the project template options in the newer BTP version?

But in the current version of BTP, Above options are not visible, Can you please tell what has been replaced with what?

entry.title: Navigation to new window not working , of "List Report " not working
entry.content:
I have created a simple managed List Report in RAP .The initial Page is displayed properly /But when i click on the arrow , none of the values are getting  displayed except the header  .It is displaying a blank page .I was expecting the Booking Date Carrier Id , Customer Id to be displayed .

Is there any attribute that I am missing  .I have attached a code of my Metadata Extension

entry.title: Failed to create service instance - "Authentication with the service broker failed. Double-check tha
entry.content:
Hi,

I am getting below error when using Microsoft Azure Singapore instance when creating Cloud Foundry ABAP environment.

Authentication with the service broker failed. Double-check that the username and password are correct.

entry.title: Download File to XLSX
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have the following queries.

I am using the MS_EXCEL_OLE_STANDARD_DAT function to download a file to Excel but I need to prevent the download from showing the contents of the file on the screen, is there any parameter for this?

Another problem I have with the same thing is that I need the Excel to be downloaded to be . XLSX and not .XLS, I don't know if this is the right feature for that since it always brings me down to .XLS.

I thank you.

entry.title: CDS view entity giving annotation error
entry.content:
I created a simple CDS view entity and for unknown reasons, it is giving me annotation errors such as 'Annotation 'AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory' used at wrong position (wrong scope)'.

So, I created another CDS view entity with a different name (but in the same package) and exactly the same query, and it activated without any errors.

I have attached a screenshot of the two CDS view entities below:

Kindly help in resolving this weird issue.

entry.title: pessimistic lock in custom RAP based application(OData V2)
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to implement pessimistic lock in one of the custom RAP based application(OData V2) where if user A is editing the document & if at the same time user B is trying to edit the same document then system should give error as "The document is currently being processed by user". 

User do not want to use optimistic lock, which lets user to go in edit mode and at the time of save system will checks the lock.

The similar functionality is already achieved in one of the standard Fiori app -- App ID
F3893 (Manage Sales Orders - Version 2) it is using pessimistic lock.

When user click on Edit button on object page, call goes to backend to check sales order is already locked or not. if it is locked then system is giving popup with error as it is already locked. However not able to understand how this is integrated into this particular app.

If anyone have any idea about this, appreciate your help in this.

entry.title: Best practice for converting FLAT file to XML in CPI
entry.content:
Hello, I'm a newc to this community, and I need to convert a flat file (like the example provided below) into XML format in CPI. I've found various blogs that suggest using Groovy scripts, while others recommend a combination of Palette functions and Groovy scripts. I'm unsure about the best practice to follow in CPI for handling this kind of scenario.

Looking for assistance from the community to meet this requirement using the best practices in CPI. Any assistance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: List Report Chart Does Not Display When Sorting - RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm encountering an issue with sorting fields for Dynamic measures, which are created using Annotation XML in BAS through Aggregation.ApplySupported. It appears that I might not be able to use this field for sorting purposes. Am I missing something, or is it not possible to sort by this field? Could you possibly provide me with a solution or point me towards relevant documentation?  Below are images of my error.

Thanks a lot.

Chart annotation

 

without sort

adding sort field (Dynamic measures)

List data is ok but Chart not display and I got error request (cause using orderby "CountRecordSum" this field is Dynamic Measures created on BAS)

entry.title: Count Top Skip are not supported in Odata Query of RAP service binding
entry.content:
Hi, RAP Expert,

I run into failure in the first query. Would you please help me on this how to resolve it ?

 

REQUEST

I tried annotation with ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_FO_QUEQRY' and the code is in the following box. But it doesn't resolve the issue .

CLASS zcl_fo_queqry DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zcl_fo_queqry IMPLEMENTATION.


  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.

              DATA(lv_offset) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
              DATA(lv_page_size) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
              DATA(lv_max_rows) = COND #( WHEN lv_page_size = if_rap_query_paging=>page_size_unlimited
                                          THEN 0 ELSE lv_page_size ).
              DATA(lt_req_elements) = io_request->get_requested_elements( ).
              DATA(lv_req_elements)  = concat_lines_of( table = lt_req_elements sep = `, ` ).
              DATA(lv_sql_filter) = io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_sql_string( ).

  TRY.


  CASE io_request->get_entity_id( ).
  WHEN 'ZR_FORDER_ITEMS' .

              IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).

              DATA lt_fo_items_response TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ZR_FORDER_ITEMS.
               SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM ZR_Forder_ITEMS
               WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
               ORDER BY transportation_order_item
               INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @LT_fo_items_response
               OFFSET @LV_offset UP TO @LV_max_rows ROWS.
               io_response->set_data( it_data = lt_fo_items_response  ).
*               CATCH cx_rap_query_response_set_twic.

             ENDIF .

           IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
**select count
              SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM ZR_FORDER_ITEMS
                                WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
                                INTO @DATA(lv_count).
**fill response
              io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lv_count ).
            ENDIF.

  WHEN 'ZR_FREIGHTORDER' .
  IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).

              DATA lt_fo_headers_response TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ZR_FREIGHTORDER.

               SELECT (lv_req_elements) FROM ZR_FREIGHTORDER
               WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
               ORDER BY transportationorder
               INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @LT_fo_headers_response
               OFFSET @LV_offset UP TO @LV_max_rows ROWS.

               io_response->set_data( it_data = lt_fo_headers_response  ).



  ENDIF.

             IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
**select count
              SELECT COUNT( * ) FROM ZR_FREIGHTORDER
                                WHERE (lv_sql_filter)
                                INTO @DATA(lv_count1).
**fill response
              io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lv_count1 ).
            ENDIF.

  ENDCASE.

        CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(exception).
        DATA(exception_message) = cl_message_helper=>get_latest_t100_exception( exception )->if_message~get_longtext( ).

  ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Best Regards!

Jacky Liu

entry.title: Is there a way to submit a controlling object into BAPI_ASSET_ACQUISITION_POST?
entry.content:
How do I submit a profit center against the offsetting account when using the function module BAPI_ASSET_ACQUISITION_POST (no fields in the submitted structures/tables).

The offsetting account I am posting to requires a controlling object and the error KI235 is returned (Account nnnnn requires an assignment to a CO object).

Is this possible?

entry.title: question, is there any medical management module integrated to SAP Employee central or SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello experts, we would like to know if there is a module where you can manage medical appointments, medication control, etc. at medical office level for an industry.
Not an independent medical center or hospital, but a small internal clinic within an industry.

Is there any solution that integrates to EMPLOYEE CENTRAL or any application already made in sap BTP or SAP independent module.

I would appreciate your comments
